roi_reason: Every preventable founder escalation currently leaves no trace, so the same interventions repeat and the founder stays the bottleneck. Wiring the ledger makes escalations measurable and gives the queue a ranked kill-list. Mechanical edit work, cheap tier, bounded to three files plus one receipt.
context_summary: Founder decision: ADOPT FOR 30-DAY PILOT — logging, scoring, and evidence collection only; owner Noetfield; implementation executor SG/SourceA; no authority changes; founder execution duties none. Recorded at the decision_ref path; task step 1 verifies that receipt before any edit. The Founder Exception Ledger spec (v1.1, advisor-review corrections applied) sits at ledger/founder-exception-ledger.md with status DRAFT / SUBMITTED / UNVERIFIED. It defines: one CSV row per founder escalation (escalating agent, lane, trigger, missing capability, three stored 1-5 factor scores), priority computed as the product of the stored scores so any verifier can recompute it, paired guardrail metrics normalized per 100 tasks/decisions, and a closure definition-of-done requiring an independently verified receipt. Gap this packet closes: no canonical CSV exists, no agent logging rule fires at escalation time, no read-surface registration. Wiring only — this packet does not claim the system is live or enforced, and it changes no authority levels.
task: 1) Confirm the founder decision receipt named in decision_ref exists and authorizes a logging/measurement pilot; if it does not exist, stop and return NEEDS_REVIEW. 2) Read ledger/founder-exception-ledger.md (v1.1 spec) in full. 3) Create ledger/founder-exception-ledger.csv with exactly one header row and no data rows, columns exactly: id,date,escalating_agent,lane,exception,trigger,founder_input,missing_capability,recurrence,frequency_score,founder_cost_score,preventability_score,permanent_owner,closure_condition,priority_fxcxp,status. 4) Append a section to AGENTS.md titled 'Founder escalation logging rule': any agent that escalates a decision to the founder must first append one row to ledger/founder-exception-ledger.csv; date, escalating_agent, lane are auto-populated; the three factor scores are stored per row; priority_fxcxp is their product and never hand-entered; the CSV is append-only and closure is a new row with the same id and status CLOSED; a row must take under 30 seconds. 5) Read data/agent_read_surfaces_v1.json, then register ledger/founder-exception-ledger.md as a read surface following the existing entry shape; if the shape is ambiguous do not guess — propose the entry in the PR description and record that choice in the receipt. 6) If data/agent_read_surfaces_v1.json was touched, run scripts/verify_agent_read_staleness_v1.sh and capture raw output. 7) Open exactly one draft PR using .github/pull_request_template.md (motor_id + task_cell + lane) containing only these changes; leave the PR unmerged. 8) Write exactly one receipt to receipts/p0pgr/ with evidence, changed_files, commands_run, raw validator_output, pr_url, verifier_handoff, pass_fail, next_pointer. This executor may set pass_fail to at most PROVISIONAL (mechanical checks green) or NEEDS_REVIEW — never PASS. verifier_handoff must name the independent verifier lane (owner_agent: verifier, p0pgr receipt-verification flow) and list exactly what it inspects: changed_files vs the PR diff, raw validator output, CSV header byte-exactness, AGENTS.md rule text. Only that independent verifier may record PASS, in its own verification receipt. 9) Keep the ledger's DRAFT status header byte-identical — adoption or LOCK marking is reserved to the founder. next_pointer: candidate follow-up packet for the weekly paired guardrail-metrics report (normalized per 100).
constraints: draft PR only — leave it unmerged, no direct push to the default branch
executor-authored PASS is prohibited: this executor's highest allowed pass_fail is PROVISIONAL or NEEDS_REVIEW; PASS is recorded only by the independent verifier
the three priority factor scores must be stored per row so any verifier can recompute priority_fxcxp
ledger DRAFT status header stays intact; adoption marking is founder-only
ledger CSV is append-only; closure is a new row with the same id, never a rewrite
forbidden_actions: no marking the ledger ADOPTED or LOCKED
no self-verification — the executing agent must not certify its own receipt (author and subject must be structurally separate)
no edits outside AGENTS.md, ledger/, data/agent_read_surfaces_v1.json, receipts/p0pgr/
no PASS based on self-report or prose-as-proof
stop_rule: Stop after the draft PR is open and exactly one receipt is written to receipts/p0pgr/ with pass_fail no higher than PROVISIONAL. Independent verification, metrics reporting, and enforcement are separate future packets.
